meaning: n.[天]五车二(御夫星座之一等星)
examples: She sang, a capella, a beautiful pure song, and then led me to the door.
Capella at one corner of the constellation Auriga. Capella marks the Charioteer's left shoulder.
Houston Public Radio Capella Tucker reports more than 300 children go to classes there every day.
Multipart singing, a capella homophonic singing, oral tradition and simple music making are its main features.
